name: R Bioconductor Dev (Codespaces)
postCreateCommand: conda run -n mesa_env R -e "user_lib <- Sys.getenv('R_LIBS_USER'); if (!nzchar(user_lib)) user_lib <- file.path(Sys.getenv('HOME'), 'R', 'library'); if (!dir.exists(user_lib)) dir.create(user_lib, recursive = TRUE); .libPaths(c(user_lib, .libPaths())); source('.devcontainer/install.R'); remotes::install_local('.', upgrade='never', lib = user_lib)"
